description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single build stage. Set GO_VERSION=1.14 and RUBY_VERSION=2.7 variables. Use golang:1.13 as the default Docker image. Add a binaries job in the build stage that runs on the custom image registry.gitlab.com/gitlab-org/gitlab-build-images:ruby-${RUBY_VERSION}-golang-${GO_VERSION}-git-2.29, executes make build, only runs for tag pipelines, and stores the files gitaly-bench and gitaly-bench-linux-amd64 as artifacts that expire in 6 months. Add a compile job in the build stage that uses the default image and runs make build. Add a verify job in the build stage that uses the default image and runs make verify.
